overall.description: First-person night hiking footage along a narrow dirt trail through dense forest. The camera operator walks past a large rock formation on the right side before continuing deeper into the dark woodland, illuminated only by a headlamp or flashlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with rock wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path, passing close to a large rock wall on the right

entered.detail: tall sandy-colored rock formation running alongside the right side of the trail
narrow dirt path with scattered leaves and small rocks
dense green bushes and tree trunks lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow forest trail at night. A large rock wall dominates the right side of the frame while vegetation lines the left. The path is illuminated by a dim light source, revealing the dirt surface and surrounding greenery in a confined, natural corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with thick undergrowth

events.description: large rock wall passes out of view as the trail enters a denser section of forest

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding forest path as the surroundings become more enclosed with dense vegetation

entered.detail: thick bushes and small trees filling the right side of the trail where the rock wall was

segments.scene_description: As the rock formation recedes behind, the trail continues through increasingly dense forest. The vegetation on both sides grows thicker, creating a more enclosed tunnel-like atmosphere. The camera maintains a steady walking pace along the narrow dirt path, with only the immediate ground and nearby trees visible in the dim light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a narrow forest trail that shifts from an open rocky corridor into a dense, enclosed woodland. It begins with a walk beside a towering rock wall that dominates the right side of the frame while greenery lines the left. As the rock formation recedes behind the camera, the path pushes deeper into the darkness, and the surrounding vegetation grows thicker on both sides. The scene then transforms into a tunnel-like atmosphere where the dim light source reveals only the immediate dirt surface and the encroaching trees. Finally, the camera maintains a steady pace, moving further into the claustrophobic embrace of the dark forest.
